---
title: "HW5 - California Wind Turbines"
author: "Esraa Saleh"
output: html_document
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(maps)
library(mapdata)

states <- map_data("state")
california <- states %>% filter(region == "california")

load("wind_turbines.rda")
wind_ca <- wind_turbines %>% filter(t_state == "CA")

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = california,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "lightblue",
               color = "white") +
  geom_point(data = wind_ca,
             aes(x = xlong, y = ylat),
             color = "red",
             size = 1.5) +
  coord_fixed(1.3)
